year: # NSW public-school term dates. NSW Department of Education publishes Eastern
# and Western Division term dates; for v1 we use Eastern Division (covers most
# of the state including Sydney). Western Division differs by ~1 week for some
# terms and only matters for far-western NSW stations.
# This file MUST be updated when NSW publishes the next year's dates.
# Comment lines (starting with '#') are filtered out by the loader.
